case_title: C.N. PATEL vs. MELENDREZ, PHILLIP A. et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT MELENDREZ, PHILLIP A. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MELENDREZ, PHILLIP A. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 77O O'FARREL ST, #46, STAYED UNTIL OCT-18-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT EVICTION STAYED UNTIL AFTER 5PM, 18-OCT-94. UPON VACATING PREMISES AND RETURNING KEYS, ETC; DEFT. SHALL BE ENTITLED TO $500.00 MOVEOUT EXPENSES AND A WAIVER OF UNPAID RENTS.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF C.N. PATEL AS TO DEFENDANT MELENDREZ, PHILLIP A. DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MELENDREZ, PHILLIP A. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
JEROME BENSON, BETH WILBER - CLERK, MARCIA HOLMES - REPORTER 9:45AM C/C FOR JURY TRIAL, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD, PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
